title: Thomas Cook India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Thomas Cook India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Thomas Cook India in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Thomas Cook India:
Thomas Cook India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thomas Cook India!
